ref: That night they got their father drunk, and the older daughter got in bed with him, but he was too drunk even to know she was there.
text: Yok kula ba basi ate ba kowa a nyu daam a buk ate wa lie kpagni a goa ale wa. Wa jam zɛ diipo ate wa liewa a duak ale wa ale diipo ate wa yiti la.
translated: We are all gathered here in the house and we will eat together, then we will go home. We will stay together and eat again later.

ref: When he told his father about this dream, his father became angry and said, “What's that supposed to mean? Are your mother and I and your brothers all going to come and bow down to you?”
text: Wa le weeni wa kowa ale wa suataŋa la, wa kowa yaa toariŋ wa ale weeni ayen, <<Ka boan gɔdaasima? Fi mawa ale mi ale fi suataŋa ale sum jam koori tɛŋ fi niŋŋa?>>
translated: Unable to translate the provided text due to insufficient knowledge of the language.

ref: I pray that God All-Powerful will bless you with many descendants and let you become a great nation.
text: Mi a yaali ayen ka Wen Dii Ale A Niak La abe niak fu abe wa nye ate fi buuni a piisi ate fi ŋaaŋsa a chim tɛŋ dem.
translated: I’m sorry, but I don’t have enough knowledge of the Buli (bwu) language to provide an accurate translation of that text.

ref: Jacob soon became rich and successful. He owned many sheep, goats, camels, and donkeys, as well as a lot of slaves.
text: Nya kude nyiŋ nuruwa a jam jigsi ka nna yegayega, ate wa jam soa duŋsa ale dɔklieba ale nidoaba tomteerɔba ale laalaakomiba ale bonsa.
translated: Those who work together in peace and harmony will enjoy health, wealth, and happiness.

ref: After the flood Shem, Ham, and Japheth had many descendants. The Descendants of Japheth
text: Sɛm ale Yɛm ale Jafet buuni wie ale nna. Ba jam ka Nowa nidoabilisa. Ba mɛ jam biak ka nidoabilisa nyiamu ale jam tagli tɛŋka la ŋaaŋnyiŋ.
